lines.text: Hey, why are you two so happy? We all got caught. We're supposed to be on the same side!
Fine. Since this {Male=mister;Female=lady} won, we should keep our promise.
That's the treasure. Only the three of us knew about it until today. Now, there's four.
This part is a little different from Exostrider parts, and there's some funny numbers on it. We thought it was special, so we kept it.
It has nothing to do with tradition. We found this while out exploring.
This part is a little different from Exostrider parts, and there's some funny numbers on it. We thought it was special, so we kept it.
What's wrong, {Male=mister;Female=lady}? You look kinda disappointed...
Don't be disappointed. What if this part is a clue to real treasure? Just look at those weird numbers on it.
I'm going to go think of a new hiding spot. If you ever want to play hide-and-seek again, {Male=mister;Female=lady}, come find us! Later!
